name: Low Sugar Butterscotch Yummies
recipeInstructions:
1. Over low heat, melt the butterscotch morsels.
2. Add the peanut butter and stir until melted.
3. Mix in the cut-up dates, shredded coconut, and chopped walnuts thoroughly.
4. Remove from heat and drop by teaspoonfuls onto a lightly buttered cookie sheet.
5. If the mixture sets before all is spooned out, reheat it slightly.
6. Place in the refrigerator to harden for 3-4 hours.
Makes 3-1/2 dozen.
